decision: Protected additive pilot completed. Legacy ScarFLIX_part-* paths were preserved; alias symlinks and additive map entries were created for the pilot only.

objectives.title: Recover Materialized QA without publication or destructive changes
objectives.strategy: Strategy A metadata-first service context plus controlled user-context probes
objectives.next_safe_action: Evaluate tiny timing diagnostic results and plan only QA-only reversible mitigation.

objectives.title: Maintain stable control plane and launch health
Maintain autonomous Grok reporting and safe inbound instruction loop
objectives.next_safe_action: Continue differential reporting and execute only Safe allowlisted instructions.

objectives.title: Keep legacy/direct resolver expansion retired and blocked
objectives.next_safe_action: Escalate if any broad legacy/direct resolver expansion resumes.

actions_taken: Queued safe bounded control-plane jobs: autonomous_incident_manager, generate_grok_cycle_report, deliver_grok_cycle_report
Maintaining Materialized QA recovery as a standing objective using Strategy A path model.
hands_off_operation.escalation_reason: No semantic progress for 197 hands-off cycles.
